calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Bresler stated that he filed the notice of hearing today and that he gave the required notice for this petition. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for and with Yvonne Lee (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler stated that he e-filed the documents yesterday. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Peter Bresler Pursuant to CCP 177.5 payable within 10 days of the order. The matter is continued to October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Sep-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Yvonne Lee and the Attorney Peter H. Bresler to appear on September 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why all of the procedural issues that were raised in the probate examiner's notes have not been cleared.

An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Attorney Peter H. Bresler to appear and show cause as to why sanctions under CCP 128 in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is also continued to September 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Continued To Apr-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Yvonne Lee (administrator).

Mr. Bresler stated that the problems with the examiner's notes are resolved and that he sent a revised petition to Mrs. Lee, but he hasn't gotten it back. Status on close of estate is continued to April 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Brelser is to have his petition filed by April 9, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Apr-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Peter Bresler, Esq., for Yvonne Lee, Administrator.

At the court's query, Mr. Bresler offers testimony as to why he failed to appear at the last calling. At conclusion of testimony, the court does not find good cause for failing to appear and counsel is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $275.00. Counsel reports on the status of the estate.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is off calendar. The remaining subject matter is continued to Apr-02-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by Mar-19-2024.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Feb-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Peter Bresler (attorney) to appear on February 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 pursuant to CCP 128 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. An Order to Appear will be issued to Yvonne Lee (petitioner) to appear on February 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 .Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, Esq., via Zoom, for Yvonne Lee, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports as to the status of the estate and a petition thereon and requests a continuance to allow for the filing of a petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jan-24-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by Jan-16-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Yvonne Lee, Personal Representative.

Mr. Bresler offers an update at the court's query and requests an additional continuance. The court notes the number of continuances it has granted and advises that it intends to take the instant petition off calendar and set a new status on close of estate. No objection to the court's tentative ruling is presented.

The subject matter is off calendar. A new Status hearing on close of Estate is set for Dec-27-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for and with Yvonne Lee, Administrator.

Counsel reports as to why he did not appear at the previous calling and confirms that aside from the 1/6th interest in the 18th Street property, believes that there may also be an annuity. Counsel advises that a petition is ready and believes that there should be an agreement from all beneficiaries regarding the preceding. The court advises counsel that he will need to file an updated Inventory and Appraisal and file the waivers if applicable.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status hearing is continued to Dec-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Yvonne Lee and Attorney Peter Bresler to appear on Nov-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
